What are Tabler Avatars?

We've curated a collection of free, realistic user avatars that are perfect for use as placeholders in your UI and web design projects. These avatars work well for profile pictures, digital profiles, character avatars, and case studies.

You can download the avatars in JPG, PNG, and WEBP formats that you can integrate and use across your designs.
